docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-01-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-21-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-01-2019 CONTINUED TO NOV-19-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). ***NOTICE: IMPENDING DISCRETIONARY DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B).*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIDONATO, FRANK HEARING SET FOR APR-03-2019 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-19-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING NOV-19-2019 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B). THE OCT-03-2019 SANCTION IS VACATED IN OPEN COURT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

FRAUD, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIDONATO, FRANK AS TO DEFENDANT SHAPOVAL, ANDREY AN INDIVIDUAL NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-21-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-17-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-29-2019 COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF, FRANK DIDONATO FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-01-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-01-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF DIDONATO, FRANK
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-01-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIDONATO, FRANK

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-03-2019 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF FRANK DIDONATO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. All previously imposed sanctions against the plaintiff are vacated. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2019 Continued To Nov-19-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Nov-19-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Court orders notice of Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)
